basic_details.job_title: OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Counsellor, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: One Stop Centre Sivasagar (OSC Sivasagar) Recruitment 2026 has been released on the official website of OSC Sivasagar. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Psychiatry/neurosciences with background in health sector/Social Work/Sociology, High School passed or equivalent, HSLC Passed
qualification.details: Counsellor: Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in the health sector/Social Work/Sociology. Minimum 3 years of experience of working with a government or non-government health project/programme at the District level. The applicant should be preferable a resident of Sivasagar District. Multi Purpose Worker: High school passed or equivalent will be preferred. Any woman who is literate with knowledge/experience of working in the relevant domain. The applicant should be preferable a resident of Sivasagar District. Security Guard: HSLC Passed. Any person minimum 2 years of experience of working as a security personnel in a government or reputed organization at the District/State level. Preference will be given to retired military/paramilitary personnel. The applicant should be resident of Sivasagar District.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OSC Sivasagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OSC Sivasagar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OSC Sivasagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Counsellor: Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in the health sector/Social Work/Sociology. Minimum 3 years of experience of working with a government or non-government health project/programme at the District level. The applicant should be preferable a resident of Sivasagar District. Multi Purpose Worker: High school passed or equivalent will be preferred. Any woman who is literate with knowledge/experience of working in the relevant domain. The applicant should be preferable a resident of Sivasagar District. Security Guard: HSLC Passed. Any person minimum 2 years of experience of working as a security personnel in a government or reputed organization at the District/State level. Preference will be given to retired military/paramilitary personnel. The applicant should be resident of Sivasagar District.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OSC Sivasagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 is 05 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026, distributed across various posts like Counsellor, Multi Purpose Worker, and Security Guard.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: For the Counsellor post, candidates need a Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in the health sector/Social Work/Sociology and at least 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Multi Purpose Worker post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Multi Purpose Worker post in the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 14000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the OSC Sivasagar Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview (Viva-Voce).

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly detail age relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any specific age relaxation rules.

faq.question: Q9. What is the qualification required for the Security Guard post?
faq.answer: For the Security Guard post, candidates must have passed HSLC and possess a minimum of 2 years of experience as a security personnel. Preference is given to retired military/paramilitary personnel.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which provides direct links to the relevant documents.
